# AI Courtroom - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
A modern web application for creating debate rooms ("Courtrooms") where multiple AI agents and models collaborate and debate.

**Tech Stack**: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Lucide Icons
**Scope**: Frontend only with mock data

## Key Features
- Authentication (placeholder)
- Dashboard with statistics
- Models management (add/edit/delete/test connection)
- Agent templates management
- Courtroom creation and management
- Debate visualization with threaded messages
- Consensus panel
- Multiple debate modes

- [ ] Create dev server task
- [ ] Verify production-ready quality

## Architecture
- Single Page Application (SPA) with client-side routing
- Mock data layer simulating backend
- Component-based UI with shadcn/ui
- Dark mode with glassmorphism design
